# DeepCloner provenance

This directory is derived from Force.DeepCloner 0.10.2:

- Upstream: https://github.com/force-net/DeepCloner
- Upstream tag: `v0.10.2`
- Tag commit: `770af80c096df3ebc9db57f567f2924e111a9ec9`
- License: MIT, reproduced in `license.txt`

Akron carries local changes for its .NET 8 build and clone lifecycle hooks. The
vendored source is therefore authoritative and must be reviewed as code when
updating the upstream version. NuGet advisory scans do not cover this copy.
